description: Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors skips keys whose (proxy trap) descriptor is undefined; basic Proxy invariant enforcement throws when trap results are inconsistent with target state (preventExtensions vs extensible target; gOPD hiding a non-configurable target prop; defineProperty adding to a non-extensible target or declaring non-configurable without a matching target prop). Valid trap uses do not throw.

object
true
undefined
